title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 55.190 - Collector to provide daily report to auditor (second class and certain first class counties)
text:
55.190.  Collector to provide daily report to auditor (second class and certain first class counties). — The county collector of revenue of each county of the first class not having a charter form of government and of each county of the second class shall provide, electronically or otherwise, a daily report to the auditor of receipts, and shall deliver to the auditor each day a deposit slip showing the day's deposit.  The collector shall, upon receiving taxes, give a numbered tax receipt to the taxpayer.  The collector shall also provide, electronically or otherwise, a daily report to the auditor of all other sums of money collected by the collector from any source whatsoever, and in such report shall state on what account collected.  The collector shall turn money over to the county treasurer under section 139.210.
(RSMo 1939 § 13871, A.L. 1973 H.B. 678, A.L. 2010 H.B. 1316) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 12208; 1919 § 9606; 1909 § 3827
